/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Os -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libns3.45-flow-monitor-default.so -o /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-flow-monitor-default.so "CMakeFiles/flow-monitor.dir/helper/flow-monitor-helper.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/flow-monitor.dir/model/flow-classifier.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/flow-monitor.dir/model/flow-monitor.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/flow-monitor.dir/model/flow-probe.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/flow-monitor.dir/model/ipv4-flow-classifier.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/flow-monitor.dir/model/ipv4-flow-probe.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/flow-monitor.dir/model/ipv6-flow-classifier.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/flow-monitor.dir/model/ipv6-flow-probe.cc.o"   -L/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: -Wl,--no-as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-internet-default.so -Wl,--as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-bridge-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-traffic-control-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-network-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-stats-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-core-default.so -Wl,--no-as-needed -Wl,--as-needed
